summary: Redirect `os.Stdout` to /dev/null around the syncResource loop in `workflow archive` when `--json` is set, then restore before emitting the final summary.
reason: `syncResource` writes per-event JSONL (`{"event":"sync_start"...}`) directly to os.Stdout. Without suppression in `--json` mode, the JSONL stream pollutes the single-object summary response, breaking JSON parsing on the consumer side and failing the `workflow archive --json` dogfood fidelity test.
